scroll_found.title: Research the The Wither scroll at a Research Pedestal

subtitle.text: Three skulls on four soul sand. You have done this before. Wither Reincarnated has seen it before too.

description: CH.11 · THE WITHER
▸ The Wither scroll is the lore record of the Wither.
Where it came from. What it represents.
The Eye Hunt has a Wither Eye (nether anchor).
Every Nether-born thing the Wither passed through
is in that eye.
Read the scroll. Then build the Eye.
◈ WITHER REINCARNATED PHASES
└ Phase 1: standard Wither behavior
Skull projectiles, Wither status, flying movement
Health: +50% over vanilla baseline
└ Phase 2 (at 60% HP): enhanced mode
Dash attack, skull rain, shield charge
Projectile immunity ends — keep melee pressure
└ Phase 3 (at 30% HP): final form
All attacks active simultaneously
Area denial skulls + dash + accelerated rate
Milk removes Wither status — keep milk in inventory
◈ FIGHT SETUP
└ Location: underground chamber (Wither breaks blocks)
Build fight room: obsidian walls, 20×10 minimum
└ Strength II + Resistance I from beacon active
└ Melee sword + shield for skull deflection (Phase 1)
└ Golden apples × 8 minimum — Wither status stacks
└ Milk buckets × 4 — emergency Wither status cleanse
◈ WITHER EYE (End Remastered)
└ Wither Eye = Nether anchor in the 9+3 portal
└ Recipe requires Nether Star + specific materials
└ Farm 2+ Withers before Ch12 for recipe coverage
└ Wither Reincarnated drops standard Nether Star
(same as vanilla — confirmed guaranteed drop)
◈ SCROLL: The Wither
└ Found in Wither shrine structures,
deep Nether fortress loot, End stronghold chests
└ Research time: 25 min
└ Unlocks: Wither lore, Wither Eye recipe awareness,
Nether anchor mechanic in portal sequence
▸ The Wither was not born in the Nether.
It was built there.
The soul sand holds the memory of what was placed
against its will.
The Wither is the result of that argument.
▶ Find The Wither scroll [check]
▶ Hold 2 Nether Stars (farm 2 Withers)
◇ Wither Eye recipe: check after researching scroll.
The recipe requires End material + Nether Star.
Farm Withers before End access to stockpile stars.
